action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline predict.py works on 5 val samples. Model loads and generates predictions. Analysis: Need to submit eval for baseline score, and prepare LoRA fine-tuning. Decision: Clean up predict.py for full test set, submit eval, and prepare training code.
